criteria_verification.evidence: Added `mode: BuildMode | None = None` keyword-only parameter to build_for(). Default None is treated as MODE_A by `effective_mode = BuildMode.MODE_A if mode is None else mode`. _CONTRACT_BY_MODE dispatch table picks the right contract per mode. Backward compat verified by TestModeADefaultBackwardCompat.test_mode_a_caller_default_matches_explicit_mode_a (asserts default-mode and explicit-MODE_A return identical entries) and the 24 pre-existing Mode A tests which continue to pass unchanged.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Builder is pure: `(build, history, mode, target_stage) -> ContextSpec`
criteria_verification.evidence: Added ModeBoundaryViolation(ValueError) with stage and mode attributes. build_for() raises it via `if effective_mode is BuildMode.MODE_B and stage in MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES: raise ModeBoundaryViolation(...)`. Test test_mode_b_forbidden_stages_raise_mode_boundary_violation is parametrised over all 4 MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES (PRODUCT_OWNER, ARCHITECT, SYSTEM_ARCH, SYSTEM_DESIGN) and asserts the exception type, .stage, .mode, and that the message contains both names.

Test test_mode_b_forbidden_stages_raise_mode_boundary_violation is parametrised over all 4 MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES (PRODUCT_OWNER, ARCHITECT, SYSTEM_ARCH, SYSTEM_DESIGN) and asserts the exception type, .stage, .mode, and that the message contains both names.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover the Mode B and Mode C forward-propagation key-example
criteria_verification.evidence: Added FixTaskRef(fix_task_id, task_review_entry_id, review_artefact_paths) with stable to_json(). _build_mode_c_task_work() emits ContextEntry(flag='--fix-task', value=fix_task.to_json(), kind='text') first, then iterates fix_task.review_artefact_paths emitting one --context path entry per allow-listed path. Tests test_mode_c_task_work_emits_fix_task_text_entry, test_mode_c_task_work_emits_review_artefact_paths, test_mode_c_task_work_filters_review_paths_outside_allowlist, and test_mode_c_task_work_without_fix_task_returns_empty cover all branches.
criteria_verification.notes: Added FixTaskRef(fix_task_id, task_review_entry_id, review_artefact_paths) with stable to_json(). _build_mode_c_task_work() emits ContextEntry(flag='--fix-task', value=fix_task.to_json(), kind='text') first, then iterates fix_task.review_artefact_paths emitting one --context path entry per allow-listed path. Tests test_mode_c_task_work_emits_fix_task_text_entry, test_mode_c_task_work_emits_review_artefact_paths, test_mode_c_task_work_filters_review_paths_outside_allowlist, and test_mode_c_task_work_without_fix_task_returns_empty cover all branches.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero
criteria_verification.evidence: Extended StageLogReader Protocol with get_all_approved_stage_entries(build_id, stage, feature_id) -> Sequence[ApprovedStageEntry]. _build_mode_c_followup_review() queries it for TASK_WORK rows and emits one allow-listed --context path entry per artefact path across all returned entries. FakeStageLogReader satisfies the Protocol via a multi_entries dict. Test test_followup_review_receives_paths_from_every_completed_task_work seeds 3 task-work entries and asserts all 3 paths are returned in order; test_followup_review_with_no_completed_task_work_returns_empty covers the empty-cycle case; test_followup_review_filters_task_work_paths_outside_allowlist covers the allowlist gating.
criteria_verification.notes: Extended StageLogReader Protocol with get_all_approved_stage_entries(build_id, stage, feature_id) -> Sequence[ApprovedStageEntry]. _build_mode_c_followup_review() queries it for TASK_WORK rows and emits one allow-listed --context path entry per artefact path across all returned entries. FakeStageLogReader satisfies the Protocol via a multi_entries dict. Test test_followup_review_receives_paths_from_every_completed_task_work seeds 3 task-work entries and asserts all 3 paths are returned in order; test_followup_review_with_no_completed_task_work_returns_empty covers the empty-cycle case; test_followup_review_filters_task_work_paths_outside_allowlist covers the allowlist gating.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 364 chars provided.
